patterns.label: Topological Tearing in Generative UI
patterns.measurement_proxy: Semantic Saponification Index (SSI): ratio of generic-template semantic tokens in output to domain-specific structural tokens from prior successful generation. SSI > 0.08 = tearing event. Operationalized as: SSI = (generic_component_count / total_component_count) where generic_component is any component indistinguishable from the model's zero-shot baseline for that component type.
patterns.task_conditioned_baseline: SSI < 0.08 on validated prior layout, with ≤ 1 orthogonal edit axis per inference pass, and context utilization < 75% of nominal window capacity.
canonical_domains: Generative UI (v0.dev, Lovable, Bolt, Cursor — multi-axis prompt collapse)
LLM Attention Theory (Lost-in-the-Middle, Attentional Dilution, Context Rot)
AI Agent Memory (Summarization Drift, Conversational Inertia)
patterns.structural_invariant: The Incremental Isolation Principle (One Major Change thermodynamic limit): layout mutations and aesthetic deformations must occupy temporally decoupled inference turns. Simultaneous multi-axis edits violate the zero-sum attention allocation constraint, fracturing the intrinsic geometric manifold of the generated layout.
comorbid_factors: Attentional Dilution: as context grows, attention per token degrades sub-linearly; accuracy drops 13.9-85% for mid-context information (Lost-in-the-Middle, Stanford/Meta 2023)
Conversational Inertia: diagonal attention patterns to previous assistant turns constrain generative exploration, causing mode collapse back to baseline templates (arXiv:2602.03664)
Summarization Drift: multi-turn compression passes silently discard structural specifics, replacing with sanitized generic history (arXiv:2603.07670)

Context Saturation Threshold: Anthropic engineering data (Sept 2025) identifies 75% utilization as quality peak; sessions at 90%+ produce lower-quality code with increased architectural inconsistencies
key_citations: arXiv:2509.10652 (Vibe Coding for UX Design, Li 2025) — documents brittleness at MVP stage, codebase bloat, context loss above 5000 lines
arXiv:2508.20410 (UI-Bench, Jung 2025) — first large-scale benchmark of 10 text-to-app tools, 4,000+ expert judgments revealing systematic quality variance under complex prompts
Lovable docs 2026 — 'Prompt by component, not page: asking it to generate an entire landing page is like dumping a recipe into a blender'
diffray.ai/context-dilution 2025 — context dilution causes 13.9-85% accuracy drops; GPT-3.5-Turbo performance fell *below closed-book baseline* with mid-context placement
arXiv:2603.00856 (PARCER 2026) — LLM attention forms U-curve; facts buried in middle ignored; robust architectures require defensive Map-Reduce compression hierarchy
